flashcards.definition: The foundation: exact values of sin, cos, tan at key angles.
Pythagorean, reciprocal, quotient, double-angle, sum/difference — the algebraic toolkit.
Isolate, use inverses, analyze quadrants, give general solutions.
Solve any triangle: AAS/ASA/SSA use Law of Sines; SAS/SSS use Law of Cosines.
Dot/cross products, polar form, De Moivre's Theorem, parametric equations.
